sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Inspect current board state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Look at the right 3x3 grid more carefully
# The white cells are error states - need to figure out how to reset them
print("\nLooking for white cells (error state)...")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"  White node: id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
